name: IdsDmMbrshDmMbrLmtDel

text.value: WITH cteInput AS ( SELECT @{pipeline().parameters.RunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO ) DELETE M FROM MBRSH_DM_MBR_LMT M JOIN cteInput i ON 1=1 WHERE M.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO <> i.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2010 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 

                       
PROCESSING:
                    Extracts from IDS and updates the datamart table MBRSH_DM_MBR_LMT

Annotations:
Job Name: IdsDmMbrshDmMbrLmtDel
Read Load File created in the IdsDmMbrshDmMbrLmtExtr Job
Copy Stage for buffer
Delet data from 

MBRSH_DM_MBR_LMT  table where LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO <> RunCycle.
